executive_summary: Engineer 8 spend-guardrails into one policy module (NEW lib/venture-deploy/spend-guardrails.js) and ENFORCE them at the venture exit-gate so a venture cannot go live with guardrails unmet — a runaway agent / traffic spike can't drain the budget. Each guardrail is a {name, check, enforce, alert} unit (agent-token ceilings, human gates, deterministic CI migrations, D1 write-ceiling+alarm+kill-switch, operator exports, Neon paid-plan, Cloud Run max-instances, per-venture isolation). A guardrail-readiness verifier is REGISTERED in lib/eva/lifecycle/exit-gate-verifiers.js GATE_VERIFIERS (distinct from siblings B/D) — FAIL-CLOSED: a registered verifier returning {satisfied:false} blocks the exit (unknown/unregistered gates skip-allow, so registration IS the fail-closed). The D1 kill-switch REUSES the existing CircuitBreaker class (lib/eva/pipeline-runner/circuit-breaker.js) READ-ONLY — no greenfield kill-switch, no modification. Per-venture guardrail state persists in a NEW additive table (+RLS) the gate + the UI (sibling E) read; the migration prod-deploy is chairman-gated. Per-venture isolation throughout (scoped by venture_id).

functional_requirements.title: 8 spend-guardrails policy module
functional_requirements.description: NEW lib/venture-deploy/spend-guardrails.js (new dir) exporting the 8 guardrails, each a {name, check(ctx)->{ok,detail}|verdict, enforce(ctx), alert(ctx)} unit: agent-token-ceiling, human-gate, deterministic-ci-migration, d1-write-ceiling (alarm + kill-switch), operator-export, neon-paid-plan, cloud-run-max-instances, per-venture-isolation. check is PURE where possible (inject resolvers for live spend/usage); FAIL-LOUD — an un-resolvable signal is 'unknown'/not-ok, never a silent ok.
acceptance_criteria: 8 guardrails each with {name, check, enforce, alert}
check is pure (injected resolvers) + fail-loud (un-resolvable => not ok, never silent ok)
unit-tested: each guardrail ok-case + violation-case

functional_requirements.title: Guardrail-readiness exit-gate verifier (FAIL-CLOSED, distinct from B/D)
functional_requirements.description: Register a guardrail-readiness verifier in lib/eva/lifecycle/exit-gate-verifiers.js GATE_VERIFIERS under a DISTINCT gate string (not the B/D gate strings); async ({supabase, ventureId, fromStage}) => {satisfied, reason}. Returns satisfied:false (with the unmet guardrail names in reason) when any guardrail is unmet for the venture — so exit-gate-enforcer.js BLOCKS the exit (fail-closed). Registration is required: an unregistered gate string skips-allow, so registering it IS the fail-closed mechanism.
acceptance_criteria: a guardrail-readiness verifier is registered in GATE_VERIFIERS under a new distinct gate string
unmet guardrails => {satisfied:false, reason naming them} => the exit-gate-enforcer blocks the venture exit
all guardrails met => {satisfied:true} => exit allowed; pinned by an integration test (block + pass)

functional_requirements.title: D1 kill-switch reuses CircuitBreaker (read-only)
functional_requirements.description: The d1-write-ceiling guardrail's enforce path REUSES the existing CircuitBreaker class from lib/eva/pipeline-runner/circuit-breaker.js (import + recordFailure/isOpen) READ-ONLY for the kill-switch — do NOT modify circuit-breaker.js, do NOT greenfield a parallel kill-switch.
acceptance_criteria: the D1 kill-switch is implemented via the existing CircuitBreaker (imported from lib/eva/pipeline-runner/circuit-breaker.js)
circuit-breaker.js is NOT modified (zero diff) — guard-tested
no duplicate/greenfield kill-switch class

functional_requirements.title: Per-venture guardrail-state migration (+RLS, chairman-gated)
functional_requirements.description: NEW migration database/migrations/<date>_venture_guardrail_state.sql — a minimal ADDITIVE per-venture table (venture_id, guardrail, status/ok, detail, checked_at, ...) + RLS (authenticated read / service_role write); NO existing-table change. The exit-gate verifier + the UI (sibling E) read it. prod-deploy is the chairman 3-factor gate (do NOT self-author @approved-by — route approval).
acceptance_criteria: additive guardrail-state table + RLS; no existing table altered
verdict/status CHECK if applicable; scoped by venture_id
live-verified once applied (real insert); migration apply is chairman-gated

functional_requirements.title: Per-venture isolation
functional_requirements.description: Guardrail checks + state are scoped per venture_id — no cross-venture blast radius. A guardrail breach / kill-switch for venture A must not affect venture B.
acceptance_criteria: guardrail state rows + checks keyed by venture_id
RLS + query scoping prevent cross-venture reads/writes
unit-tested: two ventures' guardrail states are independent

functional_requirements.title: Tests (guardrails + fail-closed gate + reuse guard + activation)
functional_requirements.description: Unit: each of the 8 guardrails (ok + violation). Integration: the exit-gate verifier blocks on unmet guardrails (fail-closed) + passes when all met (injected supabase mock). Guard: circuit-breaker.js zero-diff + no greenfield kill-switch. Activation: a test proving the verifier is wired into the exit-gate (set PRD.activation_test_id to it).
acceptance_criteria: per-guardrail unit pins (ok + violation)
integration: fail-closed block + all-met pass; circuit-breaker no-diff guard
activation test wired + PRD.activation_test_id set

technical_requirements.title: Reuse the exit-gate verifier registry
technical_requirements.description: Register in lib/eva/lifecycle/exit-gate-verifiers.js GATE_VERIFIERS ({satisfied, reason} contract); the exit-gate-enforcer.js dispatcher routes to it. Distinct gate string from siblings B/D. Registration = fail-closed (unregistered = skip-allow).

technical_requirements.title: Reuse CircuitBreaker read-only
technical_requirements.description: Import CircuitBreaker from lib/eva/pipeline-runner/circuit-breaker.js for the D1 kill-switch; do NOT modify it; no greenfield kill-switch. (NOTE: the SD scope's path lib/venture-deploy/circuit-breaker.js is wrong — the real file is lib/eva/pipeline-runner/circuit-breaker.js.)

technical_requirements.title: Additive migration + RLS + per-venture isolation; chairman-gated
technical_requirements.description: NEW additive guardrail-state table + RLS; no existing-table change; scoped by venture_id; --prod-deploy is the chairman 3-factor gate (flag + token + @approved-by matching git user.email) — route approval, do not self-author; LIVE-verify a real insert once applied.

technical_requirements.title: Fail-loud guardrail checks
technical_requirements.description: Each guardrail check fails-loud: an un-resolvable spend/usage signal yields not-ok (or 'unknown'), never a silent ok; the exit-gate treats not-ok as block.

test_scenarios.expected: check not-ok; enforce acts; alert fires

test_scenarios.scenario: d1-write-ceiling guardrail trips the CircuitBreaker kill-switch
test_scenarios.expected: enforce uses CircuitBreaker (isOpen true after recordFailure); no greenfield kill-switch

test_scenarios.scenario: exit-gate verifier with an unmet guardrail
test_scenarios.expected: {satisfied:false, reason names it} => enforcer BLOCKS the exit (fail-closed)

test_scenarios.scenario: exit-gate verifier with all guardrails met

test_scenarios.expected: venture A breach does not change venture B guardrail state
circuit-breaker.js unmodified (zero diff); no duplicate kill-switch class

acceptance_criteria: 8 spend-guardrails ({name,check,enforce,alert}) in lib/venture-deploy/spend-guardrails.js, fail-loud checks; a guardrail-readiness verifier registered in exit-gate-verifiers.js GATE_VERIFIERS (distinct from B/D) that FAIL-CLOSED blocks the exit-gate when guardrails are unmet

The D1 kill-switch REUSES the existing CircuitBreaker (lib/eva/pipeline-runner/circuit-breaker.js) read-only (zero diff, no greenfield); per-venture guardrail state persists in a NEW additive table + RLS (chairman-gated apply), scoped by venture_id

Unit+integration tests green (8 guardrails + fail-closed block + all-met pass + circuit-breaker no-diff guard); activation test wired + PRD.activation_test_id set; adversarial review of fail-closed + fail-loud + reuse + RLS clean

risks.risk: Exit-gate fail-OPEN — a venture goes live with unmet guardrails (unregistered gate skips-allow)
risks.mitigation: REGISTER the verifier in GATE_VERIFIERS (registration = fail-closed); integration test pins block-on-unmet

risks.risk: Greenfielding a kill-switch instead of reusing CircuitBreaker
risks.mitigation: import the existing CircuitBreaker read-only; guard test asserts zero circuit-breaker.js diff + no duplicate class

risks.risk: Migration chairman --prod-deploy gate strands the SD (like sibling migrations)
risks.mitigation: build everything table-independent first; route chairman approval (don't self-author); apply when approved

risks.risk: Cross-venture blast radius from shared guardrail state / kill-switch
risks.mitigation: per-venture isolation (scoped by venture_id) + RLS; unit-tested A/B independence

system_architecture.summary: One new guardrails policy module + a registered fail-closed exit-gate verifier + a per-venture guardrail-state table, reusing the existing CircuitBreaker (read-only) for the D1 kill-switch and the exit-gate verifier-registry pattern. Per-venture isolation; migration chairman-gated.

components.name: lib/eva/lifecycle/exit-gate-verifiers.js
components.change: MODIFY: register a guardrail-readiness verifier in GATE_VERIFIERS (distinct gate string), fail-closed (FR-2)

components.name: database/migrations/<date>_venture_guardrail_state.sql
components.change: NEW: additive per-venture guardrail-state table + RLS (FR-4)

components.name: tests/unit/spend-guardrails.test.js + tests/integration/guardrail-exit-gate.test.js
components.change: NEW: guardrails + fail-closed + reuse guard + activation (FR-6)

implementation_approach.summary: Author the 8-guardrail policy (pure fail-loud checks); register a fail-closed guardrail-readiness verifier in the exit-gate verifier registry; reuse CircuitBreaker read-only for the D1 kill-switch; add the additive per-venture guardrail-state migration (chairman-gated apply); per-venture isolation; pin with unit+integration tests + a circuit-breaker no-diff guard + an activation test; adversarially review fail-closed/fail-loud/reuse/RLS.
steps: author lib/venture-deploy/spend-guardrails.js (8 guardrails, fail-loud, D1 kill-switch via CircuitBreaker)
register the guardrail-readiness verifier in exit-gate-verifiers.js GATE_VERIFIERS (fail-closed, distinct gate string)
add the additive guardrail-state migration + RLS (chairman-gated --prod-deploy)
tests (8 guardrails + fail-closed block/pass + circuit-breaker no-diff + activation) + set PRD.activation_test_id
TESTING(+activation-verify) -> EXEC-TO-PLAN -> VALIDATION+REGRESSION -> retro -> PLAN-TO-LEAD -> PR+merge -> (chairman migration) -> LEAD-FINAL

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Run the spend-guardrails policy against a venture ctx violating a ceiling (agent-token over ceiling / D1 writes over write-ceiling)
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: that guardrail check returns not-ok, enforce acts (D1 kill-switch via the reused CircuitBreaker isOpen), alert fires — observable; no greenfield kill-switch.

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Run the exit-gate-enforcer with the registered guardrail-readiness verifier on a venture with an unmet guardrail, then all-met
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: unmet => {satisfied:false} => exit BLOCKED (fail-closed); all-met => {satisfied:true} => exit allowed.

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Confirm circuit-breaker.js is unmodified (git diff empty) and per-venture guardrail state is isolated (venture A breach doesn't touch B) + persisted in the new table
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: zero circuit-breaker.js diff; A/B guardrail states independent; guardrail-state rows scoped by venture_id.
